name: Configure Resting-State Eyes-Open Alpha Wave Analysis Environment
description: You are a cognitive neuroscientist preparing a resting-state EEG analysis session for a study on alpha wave dynamics. Load the EEG recording (Subject S001, eyes-open, 8 channels, 250 Hz) from ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt in Playback mode. Configure the analysis environment with both Band Power and FFT Plot widgets, a 1–50 Hz bandpass filter, and a 100 µV vertical scale for the Time Series. Enable Expert Mode, capture a screenshot of the analysis setup, and save the settings configuration.

metadata.recording_source: PhysioNet EEGMMI Dataset (eegmmidb 1.0.0), Subject S001, Run R01 (eyes open baseline)
